notes: Events 0001546417-24-000076 (2024-04-24), 0001546417-24-000074 (2024-04-04), 0001546417-24-000070 (2024-03-08), 0001546417-24-000062 (2024-03-01) contain only Form 8-K item lists with no substantive prose, so no candidates could be grounded in them; all 4 skipped.
The 2024-03-01 8-K (Items 1.01/3.02) corresponds to the ASR agreement and convertible note exchange, which are evidenced via the 2024-05-07 press release text instead.
